title: wormia papuana
intro: Wormia papuana is a plant species native to Papua New Guinea, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties in treating various ailments. Wormia papuana is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory infections. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
